Absorbing Tattoo.name: Absorbing Tattoo
Adventuring Gear.name: Adventuring Gear
Ammunition.name: Боеприпас
Antimatter Rifle.name: Antimatter Rifle
Armor of Resistance.name: Armor of Resistance
Arrow.entries.0: Arrows are used with a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.
Arrow.entries.1: Arrows are typically stored in a {@item Quiver|XPHB} (bought separately).
Arrow.name: Arrow
Arrows (20).entries.0: Arrows are used with a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.
Arrows (20).entries.1: Arrows are typically stored in a {@item Quiver|XPHB} (bought separately).
Arrows (20).name: Arrows (20)
Artisans Tools.entries.0: Artisan's Tools are each focused on crafting items and pursuing a trade. Each type of Artisan's Tools tools requires a separate proficiency.
Artisans Tools.entries.1: If you have proficiency with a tool, add your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the check too.
Artisans Tools.name: Инструменты ремесленника
Automatic Rifle.name: Automatic Rifle
Bagpipes.entries.0.items.0.name: Характеристика:
Bagpipes.entries.0.items.1.entries.0: Play a known tune ({@dc 10}), or improvise a song ({@dc 15})
Bagpipes.entries.0.items.1.name: Utilize:
Bagpipes.name: Bagpipes
Bandore.name: Bandore
Battleaxe.name: Боевой топор
Birdpipes.entries.0: Pan pipes or satyr pipes, also known as the shalm, these are sacred to {@deity Lliira|Faerûnian|scag} and popular with wood elf and wild elf bards.
Birdpipes.name: Birdpipes
Blowgun.name: Духовая трубка
Bolt.entries.0: Crossbow bolts are used with a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.
Bolt.entries.1: Bolts are typically stored in a {@item Crossbow Bolt Case|XPHB} (bought separately).
Bolt.name: Bolt
Bolts (20).entries.0: Crossbow bolts are used with a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.
Bolts (20).entries.1: Bolts are typically stored in a {@item Crossbow Bolt Case|XPHB} (bought separately).
Bolts (20).name: Bolts (20)
Breastplate.name: Breastplate
Chain Mail.name: Chain Mail
Chain Shirt.name: Chain Shirt
Chromatic Rose.name: Chromatic Rose
Cittern.name: Cittern
Cleave.entries.0: If you hit a creature with a melee attack roll using this weapon, you can make a melee attack roll with the weapon against a second creature within 5 feet of the first that is also within your reach. On a hit, the second creature takes the weapon's damage, but don't add your ability modifier to that damage unless that modifier is negative. You can make this extra attack only once per turn.
Cleave.name: Рассечение
Club.name: Дубинка
Crystal.name: Crystal
Dagger.name: Кинжал
Dart.name: Дротик
Double-Bladed Scimitar.entries.0.entries: If you attack with a double-bladed scimitar as part of the {@action Attack} action on your turn, you can use a bonus action immediately after to make a melee attack with it. This attack deals {@damage 1d4} slashing damage on a hit, instead of {@damage 2d4}.
Double-Bladed Scimitar.entries.0.name: Особое
Double-Bladed Scimitar.name: Double-Bladed Scimitar
Dragon Scale Mail.name: Dragon Scale Mail

Explosive.name: Explosive
Firearm Bullet.entries.0: Firearm Bullets are destroyed upon use in a modern firearm.
Firearm Bullet.name: Firearm Bullet
Firearm Bullets (10).entries.0: Firearm Bullets are destroyed upon use in a modern firearm.

Gaming Set.entries.0: If you have proficiency with a tool, add your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the check too.
Gaming Set.name: Gaming Set
Generic Variant.name: Generic Variant
Glaive.name: Глефа
Glaur.entries.0: Short, curved horns like a cornucopia. Played with valves, glaur sound like trumpets, while those without valves, known as gloon, have a more mournful sound.
Glaur.name: Glaur
Graze.entries.0: If your attack roll with this weapon misses a creature, you can deal damage to that creature equal to the ability modifier you used to make the attack roll. This damage is the same type dealt by the weapon, and the damage can be increased only by increasing the ability modifier.
Graze.name: Вскользь
Greataxe.name: Секира
Greatclub.name: Большая дубина
Greatsword.name: Двуручный меч
Grenade.name: Grenade
Halberd.name: Алебарда
Half Plate Armor.name: Half Plate Armor
Hand Crossbow.name: Ручной арбалет
Hand Drum.entries.0: A double-headed skin drum fitted with handles along its side.
Hand Drum.name: Hand Drum
Handaxe.name: Ручной топор
Heavy Armor.name: Тяжёлые доспехи
Heavy Crossbow.name: Тяжёлый арбалет
Hide Armor.name: Hide Armor
Hooked Shortspear.entries.0: On a hit with this weapon, the wielder can forgo dealing damage and attempt to trip the target, in which case the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw or fall {@condition prone}. The DC is 8 + the wielder's Strength modifier + the wielder's proficiency bonus.
Hooked Shortspear.name: Hooked Shortspear
Hoopak.entries.0: A hoopak is a sturdy stick with a sling at one end and a pointed tip at the other.
Hoopak.entries.1.entries.0: When you make a melee attack with this weapon, you ignore its ammunition property. You can use the hoopak as a martial ranged weapon. If you do, it uses the ammunition property, uses sling bullets, and deals {@damage 1d4} bludgeoning damage on a hit.
Hoopak.entries.1.name: Особое
Hoopak.name: Hoopak
Horn.entries.0.items.0.name: Характеристика:
Horn.entries.0.items.1.entries.0: Play a known tune ({@dc 10}), or improvise a song ({@dc 15})
Horn.entries.0.items.1.name: Utilize:

Hunting Rifle.name: Hunting Rifle
Instrument.entries.0: If you have proficiency with a tool, add your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the check too.
Instrument.name: Instrument
Ioun Stone.name: Ioun Stone
Javelin.name: Метательное копьё
Lance.entries.0: A Lance requires two hands to wield when you aren't mounted.
Lance.name: Копьё рыцарское
Laser Pistol.name: Laser Pistol
Laser Rifle.name: Laser Rifle

Light Crossbow.name: Лёгкий арбалет
Light Hammer.name: Лёгкий молот
Light Repeating Crossbow.entries.0: This crossbow is fitted with a cartridge that can hold up to six crossbow bolts. It automatically reloads after firing until the cartridge runs out of ammunition. Reloading the cartridge takes an action.
Light Repeating Crossbow.name: Light Repeating Crossbow
Longbow.name: Длинный лук
Longhorn.entries.0: A Faerûnian flute of sophisticated make, found only in areas with skilled artisans, as in great cities or elven enclaves.
Longhorn.name: Longhorn
Longsword.name: Длинный меч

Morningstar.name: Моргенштерн

Musket.name: Мушкет
Needle.entries.0: Blowgun needles are used with a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.
Needle.entries.1: Needles are typically stored in a {@item Pouch|XPHB} (bought separately).
Needle.name: Needle
Needles (50).entries.0: Blowgun needles are used with a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.
Needles (50).entries.1: Needles are typically stored in a {@item Pouch|XPHB} (bought separately).
Needles (50).name: Needles (50)
Nick.entries.0: When you make the extra attack of the Light property, you can make it as part of the {@action Attack|XPHB} action instead of as a {@variantrule Bonus Action|XPHB}. You can make this extra attack only once per turn.
Nick.name: Порез
Orb.name: Orb
Other.name: Прочее

Pike.name: Пика
Pistol.name: Пистолет
Plate Armor.name: Plate Armor
Potion of Resistance.name: Potion of Resistance
Potion.name: Potion
Push.entries.0: If you hit a creature with this weapon, you can push the creature up to 10 feet straight away from yourself if it is Large or smaller.
Push.name: Толчок
Quarterstaff.name: Боевой посох
Ranged Weapon.entries.0.entries.0: A Range weapon has a range in parentheses after the Ammunition or Thrown property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in feet, and the second is the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the long range.
Ranged Weapon.entries.0.name: Дистанция
Ranged Weapon.name: Ranged Weapon
Rapier.name: Рапира
Revolver.name: Revolver
Ring Mail.name: Ring Mail
Ring of Resistance.name: Ring of Resistance
Ring.name: Ring
Rod.name: Rod
Sap.entries.0: If you hit a creature with this weapon, that creature has {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.
Sap.name: Оглушение
Scale Mail.name: Scale Mail
Scimitar.name: Скимитар
Scroll of Protection.name: Scroll of Protection
Scroll.name: Scroll
Semiautomatic Pistol.name: Semiautomatic Pistol

Shawm.entries.0.items.1.entries.0: Play a known tune ({@dc 10}), or improvise a song ({@dc 15})
Shawm.entries.0.items.1.name: Utilize:
Shawm.name: Shawm
Shield.name: Shield
Shortbow.name: Короткий лук
Shortsword.name: Короткий меч
Shotgun.name: Shotgun
Sickle.name: Серп
Sling Bullet.entries.0: Sling bullets are used with a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.
Sling Bullet.entries.1: Sling Bullets are typically stored in a {@item Pouch|XPHB} (bought separately).
Sling Bullet.name: Sling Bullet
Sling Bullets (20).entries.0: Sling bullets are used with a weapon that has the ammunition property to make a ranged attack. Each time you attack with the weapon, you expend one piece of ammunition. Drawing the ammunition from a quiver, case, or other container is part of the attack (you need a free hand to load a one-handed weapon). At the end of the battle, you can recover half your expended ammunition by taking a minute to search the battlefield.
Sling Bullets (20).entries.1: Sling Bullets are typically stored in a {@item Pouch|XPHB} (bought separately).
Sling Bullets (20).name: Sling Bullets (20)
Sling.name: Праща
Slow.entries.0: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to it, you can reduce its {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once by weapons that have this property, the {@variantrule Speed|XPHB} reduction doesn't exceed 10 feet.
Slow.name: Замедление
Songhorn.entries.0: A recorder, a simple type of flute, usually carved from wood.
Songhorn.name: Songhorn
Spear.name: Копьё
Spellcasting Focus.name: Заклинательная фокусировка
Spiked Armor.entries.0: Spiked armor is a rare type of medium armor made by dwarves. It consists of a leather coat and leggings covered with spikes that are usually made of metal.
Spiked Armor.name: Spiked Armor
Splint Armor.name: Splint Armor
Staff.name: Staff
Studded Leather Armor.name: Studded Leather Armor
Tack and Harness.name: Tack and Harness
Tantan.entries.0: A tambourine, a popular instrument with halflings and humans south of the Dalelands.
Tantan.name: Tantan
Thelarr.entries.0: Also known as a whistlecane, a simple and easy-to-make wind instrument cut from a reed. They are so simple, in fact, that skilled bards frequently make and give them away to children—to the parents' delight or regret.
Thelarr.name: Thelarr
Tocken.entries.0: A hanging set of carved oval bells, usually played with a pair of light wooden hammers (or open handed). They are most common in underground cultures, where the resonant tones can carry.
Tocken.name: Tocken
Tool.entries.0: If you have proficiency with a tool, add your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus} to any ability check you make that uses the tool. If you have proficiency in a skill that's used with that check, you have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on the check too.
Tool.name: Tool
Topple.entries.0: If you hit a creature with this weapon, you can force the creature to make a Constitution saving throw ({@dc 8} plus the ability modifier used to make the attack roll and your {@variantrule Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus}). On a failed save, the creature has the {@condition Prone|XPHB} condition.
Topple.name: Опрокидывание
Trade Bar.entries.0: Because large numbers of coins can be difficult to transport and account for, many merchants prefer to use trade bars—ingots of precious metals and alloys (usually silver). These bars are valued by weight.
Trade Bar.name: Trade Bar
Trade Good.entries.0: Merchants commonly exchange trade goods without using currency.
Trade Good.name: Trade Good
Treasure (Art Object).entries.0: Idols cast of solid gold, necklaces studded with precious stones, paintings of ancient kings, bejeweled dishes—art objects include all these and more.
Treasure (Art Object).name: Treasure (Art Object)
Treasure (Coinage).entries.0: Characters often find coins on their adventures and can spend those coins in shops, inns, and other businesses. Coins come in different denominations based on the relative worth of their material. The Coin Values table lists coins and how much they're worth relative to the Gold Piece, which is the game's main coin. For example, 100 Copper Pieces are worth 1 Gold Piece.
Treasure (Coinage).entries.1: A coin weighs about a third of an ounce, so fifty coins weigh a pound.
Treasure (Coinage).name: Treasure (Coinage)
Treasure (Gemstone).entries.0: Gemstones are small, lightweight, and easily secured compared to their same value in coins.
Treasure (Gemstone).name: Treasure (Gemstone)
Treasure.name: Treasure
Trident.name: Трезубец
Vehicle (Air).name: Vehicle (Air)
Vehicle (Land).name: Vehicle (Land)
Vehicle (Space).name: Vehicle (Space)
Vehicle (Water).entries.0.entries.0: A ship sailing against a strong wind moves at half speed. In a dead calm (no wind), waterborne ships can't move under sail and must be rowed. Keelboats and Rowboats are used on lakes and rivers. If going downstream, add the speed of the current (typically 3 miles per hour) to the speed of the vehicle. These vehicles can't be rowed against any significant current, but they can be pulled upstream by draft animals on the shores. A Rowboat can be carried and weighs 100 pounds.
Vehicle (Water).entries.0.name: Скорость
Vehicle (Water).entries.1.entries.0: A ship larger than a Keelboat or Rowboat needs a crew of skilled hirelings (see "{@book Services|XPHB|6|Services}") to function. The minimum number of skilled hirelings needed to crew a ship depends on the type of ship.
Vehicle (Water).entries.1.name: Crew
Vehicle (Water).entries.2.entries.0: The number of Small and Medium passengers the ship can accommodate using hammocks. A ship outfitted with private accommodations can carry one-fifth as many passengers. A passenger usually pays 5 SP per day for a hammock, but prices can vary from ship to ship. A small private cabin usually costs 2 GP per day.
Vehicle (Water).entries.2.name: Passengers
Vehicle (Water).entries.3.name: Damage Threshold
Vehicle (Water).entries.4.entries.0: Repairs to a damaged ship can be made while the vessel is berthed. Repairing 1 {@variantrule Hit Points|XPHB|Hit Point} of damage requires 1 day and costs 20 GP for materials and labor. If the repairs are made in a location where supplies and skilled labor are abundant, such as a city shipyard, the repair time and cost are halved.
Vehicle (Water).entries.4.name: Ship Repair
Vehicle (Water).name: Vehicle (Water)
Vex.entries.0: If you hit a creature with this weapon and deal damage to the creature, you have {@variantrule Advantage|XPHB} on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.
Vex.name: Досада
Viol.entries.0.items.0.name: Характеристика:
Viol.entries.0.items.1.entries.0: Play a known tune ({@dc 10}), or improvise a song ({@dc 15})
Viol.entries.0.items.1.name: Utilize:
Viol.name: Viol
Wand.name: Wand
War Pick.name: Боевая кирка
Wargong.entries.0: A metal gong, traditionally made from a shield, particularly the shield of an enemy. Both goblins and dwarves make and play wargongs, their sound echoing through tunnels in the Underdark.
Wargong.name: Wargong
Warhammer.name: Боевой молот
Whip.name: Кнут
Wooden Staff.name: Wooden Staff
Yarting.name: Yarting
Yklwa.entries.0: A yklwa (pronounced YICK-ul-wah) is a simple melee weapon that is the traditional weapon of Chultan warriors. A yklwa consists of a 3-foot wooden shaft with a steel or stone blade up to 18 inches long. Although it has the thrown weapon property, the yklwa is not well balanced for throwing.
Yklwa.name: Yklwa
Zulkoon.entries.0: A complex pump organ that originated with the zulkirs of Thay, who use it in the casting of their spells. It is considered to have a dramatic, but sinister, sound.
Zulkoon.name: Zulkoon
